caption: A man wearing a blue button-down shirt with a small logo on the left chest and a head-worn microphone speaks while seated at a table. He is positioned against a light-colored backdrop featuring the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE". To his right, a blue cube-shaped object and a dark folder rest on the table. Across the sequence, the man maintains his position and attire, speaking with slight variations in his facial expressions and mouth movements. In the bottom row, a small hashtag "#BigDataSV" appears in the lower-left corner. The scene remains static in terms of composition, focusing on the man's delivery as he looks slightly off-camera toward an unseen interlocutor.
